{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Unstained Shield
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Unstained Shield]] excels in protection.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Unstained Shield]] is a path followed by Taien.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
